title: Floral Tender American Pul Biber Stir-fry
description: A floral monsoon-inspired dish featuring pul biber for a unique twist on traditional stir-fries, ideal as a keto-friendly breakfast or snack.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and add the chicken broth.
Add onion, garlic, and bell peppers to the broth. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes until vegetables soften slightly.
Stir in the fresh herbs like rosemary or thyme for added flavor and aroma.
Reduce heat to low, then drizzle in pul biber and tomato paste over the mixture. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve hot as a snack with some raw vegetables or enjoy it as part of your breakfast spread.
